issue_title: Growth, Water Scarcity, and Long-Term Supply in Nevada

facts.statement: NELIS water-related bill search returned 36 unique bills for the 80th (2019) Regular Session.
NELIS water-related bill search returned 33 unique bills for the 81st (2021) Regular Session.
NELIS water-related bill search returned 36 unique bills for the 82nd (2023) Regular Session.
NELIS water-related bill search returned 42 unique bills for the 83rd (2025) Regular Session.
NELIS keyword search identified 147 unique water-related measures across the 2019–2025 regular sessions.

Title-language cluster 'other_or_incidental' covers 95 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: AB51 (2019), SB47 (2019), SB150 (2019), SB423 (2019), SB433 (2019), SB507 (2019), SB547 (2019), AB52 (2019).
Title-language cluster 'general_water_statute' covers 28 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: AB30 (2019), AB62 (2019), AB95 (2019), AB163 (2019), AB233 (2019), AB146 (2021), AB19 (2023), AB20 (2023).
Title-language cluster 'groundwater' covers 7 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: SB140 (2019), SB149 (2021), SB112 (2023), SB113 (2023), SB176 (2023), SB180 (2023), AB363 (2025).
Title-language cluster 'dwr_appropriations' covers 6 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: SB509 (2019), AB465 (2021), SB155 (2021), SB102 (2023), SB472 (2023), SB473 (2023).
Title-language cluster 'water_rights' covers 5 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: SB236 (2019), SB250 (2019), AB6 (2021), AB470 (2023), SB31 (2025).
Title-language cluster 'water_conservation' covers 4 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: AB163 (2019), AB191 (2023), AB220 (2023), AB134 (2025).
Title-language cluster 'colorado_river' covers 3 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: SB76 (2019), AB15 (2021), SJR3 (2023).
Title-language cluster 'treatment_recycling' covers 1 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: AB265 (2019).
Title-language cluster 'drought_planning' covers 1 bills in the NELIS set. Examples: SB499 (2019).
Agency/LCB document collected: Nevada Legislative Counsel Bureau - Data Centers Background Information (https://www.leg.state.nv.us/App/InterimCommittee/REL/Document/32531).

SNWA public materials describe where Southern Nevada water comes from, including Colorado River context.
Nevada Division of Water Resources maintains a Water Planning program page.
LCB interim document “Data Centers Background Information” was collected as related agency context for growth/large-user debates.
